# CI Manual Trigger Test

This commit triggers CI to demonstrate the clean configuration.

## Expected Behavior

**Jobs that SHOULD run (6 total):**
1. Build Native (ubuntu-latest) ✅
2. Build Native (macos-latest) ✅
3. Static Analysis ✅
4. Build Android ✅
5. Build iOS ✅
6. Unity Tests ✅

**Jobs that should NOT appear:**
- Code Coverage (removed)
- Test with Sanitizers (removed)
- Build Native (windows-latest) (removed)

## Verification

User will watch this run to verify:
- Only 6 jobs appear
- All 6 pass with green checkmarks
- No failures in email notification
- Email lists only 6 jobs
